message:
🌱 remove PR title emoji checker caller (#9132)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,14 +0,0 @@
-name: "PR Title Verifier"
-
-on:
-  pull_request:
-    types: [opened, edited, synchronize, reopened]
-
-permissions:
-  contents: read
-  pull-requests: write
-
-jobs:
-  verify:
-    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-pr-verify-title.yml@88f4d5fff50ceea648cdd3848ed1835ebded5fe3 # main
-    secrets: inherit
